headline: How Hasbro’s New Bond Deal And Franchise Focus At Hasbro (HAS) Has Changed Its Investment Story
summary: Earlier this month, Hasbro completed a US$400 million registered public offering of 4.650% senior unsecured notes due March 12, 2031, priced at 99.85% of face value with callable, fixed-rate terms to support its balance sheet flexibility. Alongside this bond issuance, Hasbro’s stronger-than-expected fourth-quarter 2025 results and renewed focus on high-impact franchises and partnerships highlight how the company is using financing tools to underpin its evolving games-and-entertainment...
